doctrinal_definition.title: Hellscape Default Profile
doctrinal_definition.description: An audio mixing strategy for regions with high Catastrophic Imprint (CIC) and high Mythic Density (MDI). It replaces standard silence with a 'pressure-cooker' ambience layer composed of sub-bass trauma rumbles and fragmented archival noise.

cic_response.action: Activate 'Heavy_Layer'. Increase Low-Pass Filter (LPF) cutoff to 400Hz to simulate ear-ringing/tinnitus. Introduce random 3-5dB spikes in 'Industrial_Groan' stem.

aos_response.action: Blend 'Redacted_Voices' stem at -18dB. Apply bit-crushing to environmental foley to simulate reality degradation.

liminal_response.action: Enable 'Threshold_Sweeps'. When crossing zone boundaries, apply 100ms silence followed by re-verb spike (wet/dry > 80%).

usage_context: Applied to 'No Man's Land' biomes, post-battle zones, and corrupted ritual sites.
